anomalies.message: Stem references '如右图所示' (graph of f''(x)) but no image is captured in paper Markdown. Answer from solution Markdown assumes a specific graph shape.
Options C and D recovered from paper Markdown. Original parser only extracted ['A', 'B']. All 4 options now present.
Option A recovered from paper Markdown. Original parser only extracted ['B', 'C', 'D']. All 4 options now present.
System-of-equations solution LaTeX for stationary points is garbled by OCR. Garbled LaTeX preserved as-is; human should verify against original PDF.
Final answer in explanation appears as '1 6' (OCR artifact for 16). E(Y)=16 confirmed by derivation.
Source repo Kaoyan-Math1-Papers at commit 3151b4a is dirty; 2015 paper/solution files are tracked and clean.
